# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent supply chain security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "myorg/secure-app",
    "description": "Application with secure post-install and post-update automation",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "minimum-stability": "stable",
    "prefer-stable": true,
    "require": {
        "php": "^8.1"
    },
    "config": {
        "process-timeout": 300,
        "sort-packages": true,
        "allow-plugins": {},
        "secure-http": true,
        "disable-tls": false
    },
    "scripts": {
        "verify-checksums": [
            "@php scripts/verify-checksums.php"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "mkdir -p var/cache var/log var/tmp public/assets",
            "chmod 750 var/cache var/log var/tmp",
            "chmod 755 public/assets"
        ],
        "set-permissions": [
            "chmod -R o-rwx var/",
            "chmod 644 .env.dist",
            "find scripts/ -name '*.php' -exec chmod 644 {} \\;",
            "find scripts/ -name '*.sh' -exec chmod 750 {} \\;"
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "run-migrations": [
            "@php scripts/run-migrations.php"
        ],
        "validate-config": [
            "@php scripts/validate-config.php"
        ],
        "security-audit": [
            "@composer audit --format=plain"
        ],
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@validate-config",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@set-permissions",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@security-audit"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@validate-config",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@download-assets",
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@set-permissions",
            "@run-migrations",
            "@security-audit"
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "verify-checksums": "Verifies SHA-256 checksums of all downloaded assets against known-good values",
        "download-assets": "Downloads required assets over HTTPS from allowlisted domains with integrity checks",
        "setup-directories": "Creates required application directories with restrictive permissions",
        "set-permissions": "Applies least-privilege file permissions to application directories and files",
        "compile-assets": "Compiles and minifies frontend assets for production",
        "run-migrations": "Runs pending database migrations safely",
        "validate-config": "Validates application configuration before setup proceeds",
        "security-audit": "Runs Composer security audit to check for known vulnerabilities in dependencies"
    },
    "extra": {
        "asset-sources": {
            "_comment": "All asset URLs must use HTTPS and belong to allowlisted domains. Checksums are SHA-256.",
            "allowed-domains": [
                "cdn.example.com",
                "assets.myorg.com"
            ],
            "assets": [
                {
                    "url": "https://cdn.example.com/libs/framework-3.2.1.min.js",
                    "target": "public/assets/js/framework.min.js",
                    "sha256": "e3b0c44298fc1c149afbf4c8996fb92427ae41e4649b934ca495991b7852b855"
                },
                {
                    "url": "https://cdn.example.com/libs/styles-3.2.1.min.css",
                    "target": "public/assets/css/styles.min.css",
                    "sha256": "a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2"
                }
            ]
        }
    }
}
